channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Governor Idris Reaffirms APC’s Stronghold in Kebbi Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Governor Nasir Idris of Kebbi State don talk say him go make sure say President Bola Tinubu and the All Progressives Congress (APC) go win well-well for the 2027 general election. He yarn this one aft...

item.title: US-Iran peace talks stall as Trump sets deadline over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tensions between the US and Iran continue to escalate as Iran rejects a temporary ceasefire proposed by the United States, insisting instead on a permanent resolution to the ongoing conflict. Iran com...

item.title: Ben Wallace warns of UK's vulnerability to Iranian missile threat amid delay to Defence Readiness Bill
item.description: Former Defence Secretary Ben Wallace has warned that the United Kingdom would currently be unable to defend itself against a missile attack from Iran, calling on the government to be transparent with ...

item.title: Over 900 drivers arrested for drunk driving during Easter weekend in South Africa
item.description: Over the Easter long weekend, South African law enforcement authorities made significant strides in curbing road incidents caused by drunk driving. Between Thursday and Saturday, a total of 934 motori...

item.title: House Committee on Justice subpoenas Ramil Madriaga as key witness in impeachment case against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The House Committee on Justice has issued a subpoena to Ramil Madriaga, identified as the self-confessed bagman of Vice President Sara Duterte, requiring him to testify in the ongoing impeachment proc...

item.title: Artemis II astronauts embark on historic mission beyond high Earth orbit
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission marks the first manned journey beyond high Earth orbit in 54 years, reigniting global interest in lunar exploration. The crew—commander Reid Wiseman, pilot Victor Glover, mis...

item.title: Stormers refocus on URC after narrow Champions Cup loss to Toulon
item.description: The Stormers were devastated after narrowly losing 28-27 to Toulon in a dramatic Champions Cup last-16 clash at Stade Mayol in France. Despite a valiant fight, the Cape side was denied a late try foll...

item.title: Recorded stalking offences in England and Wales rise dramatically over the past ten years
item.description: The number of stalking offences recorded by police in England and Wales has surged over the past decade, rising from just under 3,000 to over 135,000 last year. Experts attribute this increase to grea...

item.title: Welsh holiday let owner warns new council tax rules could force bankruptcy
item.description: Paul Martin, who runs four holiday cottages near Newtown in Powys, has expressed concerns that new regulations introduced by the Welsh government could lead to bankruptcy. These rules impose council t...

item.title: Eames Office and Kettal Reimagine Modular Living with the Eames Pavilion System
item.description: The Eames Pavilion System is a contemporary revival of Charles and Ray Eames’s vision for adaptable, modular architecture. Developed by the Eames Office in collaboration with Spanish furniture manufac...

item.title: A Blind Musician Finds Confidence and Connection Performing in Toronto’s Subway
item.description: Christine Malec, a blind musician in Toronto, shares her experiences performing in the city’s subway stations. Navigating stations with a white cane, she carries her guitar, busking licence, travel mu...

item.title: Artemis II Crew Sets New Human Spaceflight Distance Record During Lunar Flyby
item.description: The Artemis II mission has made history by becoming the farthest human spaceflight ever from Earth, surpassing the distance record set by Apollo 13 in April 1970. At precisely 1:57 p.m. ET, NASA’s Ori...

item.title: Form Three Student from Kenya High School Missing in Nyeri; Belongings Found in Karatina
item.description: Joy Wanjiru Gathiga, a Form Three student at Kenya High School, has gone missing after leaving school for her home in Nyeri. She travelled with her brother to Nairobi and boarded a matatu to Nyeri on ...

item.title: Man's body found in Cumbernauld following five-month disappearance
item.description: Police Scotland have reported the discovery of a body in the woods near Hillcrest Terrace in Cumbernauld, North Lanarkshire, as part of an ongoing investigation into the disappearance of John Miller, ...

item.title: Analyst Reacts to Trump’s Latest Threats Against Iran on Social Media
item.description: In a recent social media post, former President Donald Trump made bold statements about escalating tensions with Iran. He threatened further strikes on Iranian infrastructure, which sparked a reaction...

item.title: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson Resigns, Transition Period Announced
item.description: Air India's chief executive, Campbell Wilson, has resigned from his position but will be staying on with the airline to ensure a smooth transition until a replacement is found. This development comes ...

item.title: Mbalula Addresses ANC Trademark Dispute, Service Delivery Concerns at Mahlangu Commemoration
item.description: ANC Secretary-General Fikile Mbalula recently led commemorations honouring anti-apartheid activist Solomon Mahlangu, marking the anniversary of his execution. The event included visits to the prison w...

item.title: Two orphaned bear cubs find refuge at Vancouver Island wildlife centre after mother’s death
item.description: Two young black bear cubs from Vancouver Island have found shelter at the North Island Wildlife Recovery Centre after their mother was discovered dead inside their den. According to the centre’s state...

item.title: Arslanbek Makhmudov on faith, family and facing Tyson Fury at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
item.description: In an interview ahead of his heavyweight bout with Tyson Fury at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, Arslanbek Makhmudov speaks warmly and respectfully of the former world champion, describing him as the ‘prof...

item.title: Ministry clarifies support issue as Kenyan skater Kevin Kiarie shines in Benin championship
item.description: Kenyan speed skater Kevin Kiarie has become the centre of online discussion after his impressive win in Benin. His victory brought pride to many Kenyans, who flooded social media with praise and quest...
